# Web Development Child Skill Routing

- Raw web idea or launch scope: `site-product-requirements-desk`
- Sitemap, nav, URL, route, or content hierarchy: `information-architecture-desk`
- Components, tokens, responsive UI, or interaction states: `ux-ui-design-system-desk`
- Framework, rendering, routes, state, forms, or implementation handoff: `frontend-engineering-desk`
- API, auth, CMS, service, data, or third-party integration: `backend-integration-desk`
- CMS, editorial, localization, publishing, content migration: `cms-content-operations-desk`
- Auth/session, headers, CSP, secrets, third-party scripts, abuse, hardening: `web-security-secops-desk`
- Core Web Vitals, bundle, assets, caching, TTFB, rendering cost: `web-performance-desk`
- WCAG, semantic HTML, keyboard, metadata, structured data, crawlability: `accessibility-seo-desk`
- Browser/device, responsive, visual, integration, smoke, regression QA: `web-testing-qa-desk`
- RUM, synthetic checks, dashboards, alerts, incidents: `web-observability-desk`
- CI/CD, preview, CDN, edge, environment promotion, rollback: `web-release-deployment-desk`
- Growth, experiments, analytics iteration, content refresh, refactor, migration: `web-maintenance-growth-desk`
